items.claim: Mario Bautista has momentum coming into this fight.
items.quote: You see the momentum that he has

items.claim: Cory Sandhagen has faced a higher caliber of competition than Mario Bautista.
items.quote: Cory Sanhagen just been fighting better fighters.

items.claim: Cory Sandhagen has not been cleanly outstruck by non-elite fighters.
items.quote: We've yet to really see him cleanly outruck by guys who aren't super elite.

items.claim: Mario Bautista does not pose a significant takedown threat to Cory Sandhagen.
items.quote: he doesn't need to worry about the takedowns from Mario Bautista as much.

items.claim: Cory Sandhagen utilizes a more diverse striking attack than Mario Bautista.
items.quote: at striking range, Cory Sandhagen just gives you a more diverse attack.

items.claim: Cory Sandhagen's movement will make Mario Bautista's striking appear less crisp than usual.
items.quote: the movement coming from Cory Sandhagen is going to make it look less crisp than it normally does.

items.claim: Mario Bautista fights in a conventional, coached style.
items.quote: He's fighting the way somebody would be trained to fight.

items.claim: Cory Sandhagen employs a unique, unconventional fighting style.
items.quote: Cory Sanhagen kind of the beat of his own drum. Like people don't fight the way that he fights.
